headline: Only 39% Of Consumers Trust AI For Purchases, Yet Starbucks Is Using ChatGPT To Pick Your Next Drink
summary: ChatGPT is becoming a new way for Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) customers to discover drinks, even as most consumers still do not trust artificial intelligence to make everyday purchases. Only 39% do, according to research from The Harris Poll conducted with Quad...

headline: Starbucks' Margin Recovery Takes Shape: Can Cost Leverage Build?
summary: SBUX's Q2 FY26 margin rises 110 bps to 9.4%, and EPS jumps 22%, with cost savings and moderating pressures key to sustaining earnings leverage.

headline: TD Cowen Just Upgraded Starbucks to Buy: Margin Recovery, Sales Drivers Power Comeback Story
summary: One of Wall Street’s top firms just put its stamp of approval on the Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) comeback story. TD Cowen upgraded Starbucks to Buy from Hold and raised its price target to $120 from $106, calling out “numerous tangible drivers” that should fuel positive sales revisions against a strong category backdrop. headline: Starbucks stocks pops as TD Cowen upgrades to Buy on expected margin recovery
summary: Investing.com -- TD Cowen has upgraded Starbucks to Buy and raised its price target to $120, arguing that the coffee chain's turnaround is still in its "early innings" with multiple drivers that could push earnings and margins above Wall Street expectations over the next two and a half years.
